# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-007](task-0063): Job Validation

## Purpose

Validate jobs.

## Scope

- Validation rules
- Check logic
- Error reporting

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Implement checks
3. Report errors

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Checks work
3. Errors reported
